allow: Bash(npx --yes tsx -e "import { questions } from './src/data/questions.ts'; const counts = questions.reduce\(\(a,q\)=>{a[q.category]=\(a[q.category]||0\)+1;return a;},{}\); const diff = questions.reduce\(\(a,q\)=>{a[q.difficulty]=\(a[q.difficulty]||0\)+1;return a;},{}\); console.log\('Total:', questions.length\); console.log\('By category:', counts\); console.log\('By difficulty:', diff\); const dups = questions.map\(q=>q.id\).filter\(\(id,i,arr\)=>arr.indexOf\(id\)!==i\); console.log\('Duplicate IDs:', dups\); const bad = questions.filter\(q=>!Number.isInteger\(q.answer\) || q.answer<0 || q.answer>3 || q.options.length!==4\); console.log\('Malformed:', bad.length\);")
